message:
fix(core): resolve SELECT * column names through nested derived tables

Double-nested subqueries like SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM (...)) sub
previously truncated result columns because infer_select_column_names
returned ["*"] without resolving the actual column count and names.

Added resolve_subquery_star_columns() to recursively walk through nested
subquery/table sources and expand star columns.  Also updates col_names
from actual result width when static inference produces unresolved stars.

Also adds 10 new conformance oracle tests: CASE expressions, string edge
cases, GROUP BY advanced, UPDATE/DELETE complex, integer boundaries,
self-join, derived tables, datetime arithmetic, multi-index.

Core: 1673 pass, 0 fail.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
